prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ALI-PARANECK-PARENT Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Paracord Necklace Fire Starter Striker Tool (2 Colors and Styles) Description: The ASR Outdoor Fire Starter Necklace is a must-have emergency tool. Each necklace comes with a fire starter striker so you can ensure you have access to a heat and light source in case of an outdoor emergency.

Colors Available: Orange or Black
Blade Style Available: Straight or Serrated Search Terms: paracord fire starter bracelet campfire knots tactical 550 cord kit rope emergency outdoor prep prepper tools camping hiking survival striker surivalist wilderness cordage utility accessories necklace flint adjustable scraper spark tinder Features: - EMERGENCY FIRE STARTER - The ASR Outdoor Fire Starter Necklace is a must-have emergency tool. Each necklace comes with a fire starter striker so you can ensure you have access to a heat and light source in case of an outdoor emergency. - MINI FERRO ROD - The necklace also comes with a mini ferrocerium rod that can be used with the striker to easily create sparks, allowing you to start a fire without any other tools. It will work at any altitude and in any weather condition, so you can rest assured you'll have access to heat rain or shine. - STRAIGHT OR SERRATED BLADE - The striker features either a straight or serrated blade that will assist with striking the mini Ferro rod to create flame sparks. It can also be used as a sturdy cutting device in a pinch! - ADJUSTABLE NECKLACE - The necklace itself is constructed of durable 550 paracord and can be adjusted for custom comfort. It has an overall length of 16", and can be taken apart to double the length of paracord in an emergency. - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: black or orange; Material: steel/550 paracord/ferrocerium; Blade style: straight or serrated; Paracord length: 16"; Blade width: 1" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
